final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cozy cat daily scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "治愈系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Studio Ghibli background art tradition, Japanese ほっこり (hoko-ri) cozy illustration style, Moomin soft watercolor heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include an orange tabby cat as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include a windowsill interior setting with warm indoor atmosphere; must include a snowy winter streetscape visible through the window
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, cozy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a fluffy, soft surface treatment — exact fur texture and warmth is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
